_comment_audit_log_file: Path to append-only audit log file. Empty = disabled.
_comment_auth: API key authentication. Keys are stored as SHA-256 hashes; plaintext is not retained.
_comment_cluster: Cluster membership and leader election settings.
_comment_drain_timeout_ms: Max wait (ms) for in-flight requests during Stop(). 0 = default (5000 ms).
_comment_flow_control_pause_ms: Pause (ms) before moving a message to the DLQ when a push consumer channel is full. 0 = default (100 ms).
_comment_gateway: Embedded HTTP/WebSocket gateway for browsers and SDK-less clients.
_comment_network: TCP listener and optional TLS settings.
_comment_rate_limit: Token-bucket rate limiting with automatic cleanup of idle buckets.
_comment_retention: Message retention policy applied by the background compaction loop.

auth._comment_api_keys: List of API keys. Each grants a set of permissions to a named client.
auth._comment_enabled: Set true to require an API key on every connection.

api_keys._comment_client_id: Human-readable label used in audit logs.
api_keys._comment_key: Raw API key. Hashed at startup; never stored in plaintext.

broker._comment_node_id: Unique ID for this broker in a cluster. Must be stable across restarts.

cluster._comment_election_timeout_max: Upper bound of randomised election timeout in ms. Default: 750.
cluster._comment_election_timeout_min: Lower bound of randomised election timeout in ms. Default: 450.
cluster._comment_heartbeat_interval: Leader heartbeat period in ms. Default: 150.
cluster._comment_mtls_ca_file: PEM CA certificate for verifying peer node certificates.
cluster._comment_mtls_cert_file: PEM certificate for mutual TLS between nodes. Plain TCP if any field is empty.
cluster._comment_node_id: Unique stable identifier for this node in the cluster.
cluster._comment_quorum_timeout_ms: Max wait (ms) for ISR quorum ack. Default: 5000.
cluster._comment_raft_data_dir: Directory for Raft persistent state. Defaults to <data_dir>/raft.
cluster._comment_seeds: List of seed node addresses to contact on startup.

compaction._comment_interval_ms: Compaction sweep period in ms. Default: 60000 (60 s).
compaction._comment_tombstone_grace_ms: Tombstone retention in ms before purge. Default: 86400000 (24 h).

gateway._comment_addr: Listen address for the gateway HTTP server, e.g. ':8080'.
gateway._comment_enabled: Start the gateway as part of the broker process. Default: false.

network._comment_admin_port: The HTTP admin port is always the TCP port + 1 (9001 by default).
network._comment_dashboard_enabled: Enable the embedded dashboard at GET /dashboard. Default: true.
network._comment_explorer_enabled: Enable Live Message Explorer WS endpoint. Default: true (read-only live tail, same risk profile as dashboard).
network._comment_explorer_max_conn: Max concurrent Explorer WebSocket connections. 503 when exceeded. Default: 50.
network._comment_host: Interface to bind. '0.0.0.0' for all, '127.0.0.1' for loopback only.
network._comment_idle_timeout: Idle connection timeout in nanoseconds (5 min = 300000000000).
network._comment_max_connections: Maximum concurrent client connections. Excess connections are rejected.
network._comment_port: TCP port. Use 0 to let the OS assign an ephemeral port (useful for tests).
network._comment_pprof_enabled: Enable /debug/pprof/ profiling endpoint on the HTTP admin server.
network._comment_read_timeout: Per-frame read deadline in nanoseconds (30 s = 30000000000).
network._comment_tls_cert_file: Path to TLS certificate (PEM). Leave empty to disable TLS.
network._comment_tls_key_file: Path to TLS private key (PEM). Required when tls_cert_file is set.
network._comment_tls_min_version: Minimum TLS version. 0 = default TLS 1.3 (0x0304). Set 0x0303 for TLS 1.2.

rate_limit._comment_burst_multiplier: Burst capacity = rate × multiplier. Must be >= 1.
rate_limit._comment_enabled: Set true to enforce rate limits.
rate_limit._comment_per_client_rps: Maximum requests per second from one client.
rate_limit._comment_per_topic_rps: Maximum requests per second targeting one topic.

replication._comment_ack_timeout: Follower ack timeout in nanoseconds before marking out-of-sync.
replication._comment_factor: Number of replicas per partition including the leader. Min: 1.
replication._comment_sync_interval: Follower pull heartbeat interval in nanoseconds (100 ms = 100000000).

retention._comment_max_age_hours: Delete segments whose oldest record exceeds this age in hours.
retention._comment_max_size_mb: Delete oldest non-active segments when total partition size exceeds this (MiB).

storage._comment_data_path: Root directory for segment files (one sub-directory per topic-partition).
storage._comment_index_interval_bytes: Sparse index granularity in bytes. Smaller = faster seeks, more disk.
storage._comment_segment_max_bytes: Maximum segment file size in bytes before rollover. Default: 1 GiB.
storage._comment_sync_policy: Fsync strategy: 'always' (safest), 'interval' (default, 100 ms ticker), 'os' (no fsync, risk of data loss on power failure).
storage._comment_wal_path: Directory for the write-ahead log. The offset WAL is stored at <wal_path>.offsets.
